The '''Holiday Towers Hotel and Casino''', also referred to as simply '''Holiday Towers''',<ref name="Zorba">''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]''</ref> was a hotel and casino on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. It was described as being well-appointed, but not as luxurious as other [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] establishments.

==Characteristics==
Holiday Towers had four 12 story tall sections. It was located on the west end of [[Figg Plaza]] which gave it an exceptional view of Bespin sunsets. It could hold up to 1600 guests and was composed of single, double, deluxe double, and 8 suite rooms. It had a casino on the twelfth floor of each tower which were connected via [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] walkways. The central courtyard had an [[Antigrav/Legends|anti-grav]] pool and the [[Blue Petal Bar]] floated over it.<ref name="GG2" />

==History==
Holiday Towers initially belonged to criminal businessman [[Opun Mcgrrrr|Opun "Black Hole" Mcgrrrr]], but [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] stole the hotel from him in what was described as "a bloody coup", approximately on [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="GG2" /> In revenge, Mcgrrrr then stole Jabba's accounting droid [[CZ-3/Legends|CZ-3]], trying to obtain information to blackmail Jabba, but this plot failed.

Later, after Jabba's death on [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] confiscated the hotel. Calrissian did not know that Jabba had left his last will on droid [[CB-99]], which was hidden on a secret room that only Jabba and his father, [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]], knew.

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], Zorba reached Bespin and threatened Calrissian with Jabba's will. Calrissian tried to keep the hotel by playing [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with Zorba. Unfortunately for Calrissian, Zorba used his own, rigged cards, winning from Lando both the Holiday Towers hotel and all of his belongings in Cloud City.
